entry.title: New: CC 25-13 (Maui) — Agenda Ready
entry.content:
AGRICULTURE, DIVERSIFICATION, ENVIRONMENT AND PUBLIC TRANSPORTATION COMMITTEE CHAIR, transmitting a proposed amendment to Bill 75, CD1 (2025), entitled "A BILL FOR AN ORDINANCE AMENDING TITLE 19, MAUI COUNTY CODE RELATING TO THE COMPREHENSIVE ZONING ORDINANCE ON AGRICULTURAL TOURISM".

Council of the County of Maui

View on the council site
